title: DRUMP SIMULATOR
description:
DRUMP SIMULATOR is a satirical game where you make choices as a completely fictional American President named Tonald Drump.

MAKE QUESTIONABLE CHOICES

Your trusted advisers will present you with dilemmas to resolve with your HUGE wisdom! Avoid losing the support of the voters during your term to escape the wrath of the public and discover what more awaits you at the end... (It's special endings)

WHACK-SOME-TARIFFS 

They were warned, but they did not listen! Now its time for them to feel the wrath of the tariff! Use your presidential power to slap some tariffs like only a real patriot can!

HAIR FORCE ONE

Tweet past the enemy's defenses to connect with your voters! No other bird can flap like this!

USE THE WAR MACHINE

Engage in brilliant millitary action using your presidential war machine! Can you be quick enough?!

LOADS MORE MINI-GAMES!17 mini-games and 5 special endings await you in the office, Mr. President. Are you ready to lead the nation?

PLUS AN ARCADE MODE!Endless Arcade mode, complete with an official Steam Leaderboard to show everyone you mean business!
description_short: A satirical game where you make choices and play mini-games as the American President Tonald Drump.
